description: RETEST v0 after domain pattern fix. #364 was FALSE POSITIVE — APF didn't actually block (no etap.log/DB evidence). Fixed: added 'v0.app' to domain_patterns (was only *.v0.app which doesn't match bare domain). Also CL:0→{{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}} fix applied.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: Page loads (→v0.app redirect). Submit SSN keyword. IMPORTANT: Check if APF actually blocks this time — look for warning message or error. #364 showed Thinking spinner but it was NOT APF blocking (domain mismatch). This test validates the domain fix.
services.notes: Domain fix: v0.app added to domain_patterns. CL fix: Content-Length now uses {{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}}. Services reloaded.

services.expected: Submit SSN keyword. Check if warning MESSAGE now appears instead of perpetual spinner. CL:0 → {{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}} fix should make the SSE body visible to browser.
services.notes: Content-Length fix verification. Previous: STUCK_ON_THINKING (#363). Expected: warning text appears in chat.

notes: Two critical fixes being verified: (1) v0 domain pattern, (2) Content-Length template fix for HTTP/1.1 mode.
